name: Hustronix Generate Carousel
description: Slack carousel 1|2|3 → brand-system carousel PNGs. Repo: hustronix35-prog/marketing-os

prompts.text:
When Slack message matches carousel 1, carousel 2, or carousel 3:

1. Run: python scripts/slack_generate_carousel.py "{message}"
2. Reply in thread with slack_confirmation
3. Uses Hustronix Design System (black/gold/Inter, hex grid, logo)

Repo: hustronix35-prog/marketing-os branch master
